items.content_statement: Identify and label a range of complex emotions and describe how personal factors influence emotions
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when situations call for emotional analysis - multiple valid frameworks for understanding emotion-factor relationships

items.content_statement: Explain how others' responses to situations can impact their emotions and identify ways to regulate their response
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability for understanding emotional dynamics and generating regulation strategies - occasion-prompted reasoning skill

items.content_statement: Compare how personal strengths, challenges, interests, and values have developed and changed over time in order to revise post-secondary plans as needed
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability for self-assessment and planning revision - occasion-triggered when planning decisions arise

items.content_statement: Reframe a current challenge or setback by reflecting on past successes
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when challenges arise - cognitive reframing skill triggered by specific situations

items.content_statement: Maintain a growth mindset about abilities to succeed, grow and persist through challenges
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation that operates across contexts over time - not occasion-triggered but maintained as ongoing stance

items.content_statement: Evaluate how thoughts and emotions impact decision-making and responsible behavior
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when evaluating decisions - occasion-triggered skill requiring reasoning across multiple factors

items.content_statement: Consistently use coping skills and calming strategies to process emotions, reframe thoughts, and respond to stressful situations
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - 'consistently' indicates ongoing enactment across contexts, not occasion-triggered deployment

items.content_statement: Develop and monitor a plan, utilizing school, family and community resources, that demonstrates an understanding of how to set and reach goals that contribute to life-long success
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability for goal-setting and resource utilization - occasion-triggered when planning is needed

items.content_statement: Evaluate progress toward achieving a specified goal and re-evaluate or adapt the plan or action steps as needed
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability for progress evaluation and plan adaptation - occasion-triggered when assessment is needed

items.content_statement: Analyze the level of control they have over situations in academic and social life
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability for assessing personal agency - occasion-triggered when situations require control assessment

items.content_statement: Demonstrate the ability to reframe difficult situations into opportunities that promote resilience and optimism
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability for cognitive reframing - occasion-triggered when difficult situations arise

items.content_statement: Relate to other people by practicing empathy and compassion by highlighting and honoring differing perspectives, abilities, backgrounds, cultures or social groups
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - practicing empathy and compassion operates by default across contexts, not just when prompted

items.content_statement: Demonstrate ways to model respect across settings when viewpoints or perceptions differ
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - modeling respect across settings operates by default, not just when prompted

items.content_statement: Reflect on and implement strategies to model inclusivity and build community
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - modeling inclusivity and building community operates by default across contexts

items.content_statement: Demonstrate empathy by being compassionate and encouraging others
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - being compassionate and encouraging operates by default across contexts

items.content_statement: Identify things and people they are grateful for, even in challenging or stressful life experiences
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - maintaining gratitude even in challenging experiences operates as a sustained practice across contexts

items.content_statement: Be a contributing citizen in our school community and create opportunities to contribute to the well-being of self and others
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - being a contributing citizen operates by default across contexts, not just when prompted

items.content_statement: Establish and practice strategies to build and maintain positive personal, school and community relationships
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when relationship-building situations arise - multiple valid approaches exist

items.content_statement: Demonstrate collaboration in a group setting and work toward a common goal by valuing different and diverse perspectives, abilities, backgrounds, and cultures
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed in group contexts - quality of reasoning about diverse perspectives determines outcome

items.content_statement: Apply constructive feedback to strengthen connections and achieve common goals
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when feedback situations arise - multiple valid approaches exist

items.content_statement: Demonstrate responsible use of social and digital media and understand the potential impact on post-secondary goals
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when making media use decisions - reasoning quality about consequences determines outcome

items.content_statement: Independently use conflict resolution skills to defuse disagreements, honor differences, and solve problems peacefully, recognizing that seeking help is a strength
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when conflicts arise - multiple valid approaches exist, quality of reasoning determines outcome

items.content_statement: Make reasoned judgments after analyzing ideas, information, data and facts for both personal and social problems
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when decision situations arise - Type 2

items.content_statement: Demonstrate critical thinking skills to select and implement an appropriate decision-making process to solve complex problems and challenges
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when problem-solving situations arise - Type 2

items.content_statement: Evaluate how external factors (i.e. media, peers, social and cultural norms and expectations of authority) impact personal decision making
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when evaluating decision contexts - Type 2

items.content_statement: Reflect on lessons learned from actual experiences to inform future practices
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when reflecting on experiences - Type 2

items.content_statement: Take the perspective of those they want to help, empathize with their experience, and understand how best to help in a way that is respectful and responsive to their feelings and needs
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation of empathy and responsiveness enacted across contexts - Type 3

items.content_statement: Evaluate factors that impact personal and community well-being, and apply appropriate preventative and protective strategies
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when evaluating well-being factors and selecting strategies - Type 2
